Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New listing (published May 29, 2026)

【Event Details】

Date: July 22 (Wednesday)

Meeting time: 10:00 a.m.

Meeting place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Route: City Hall → Nakayama Nishi intersection → Kōrai Pass → in front of Tanabe-en Tea Factory → Metsä → Seimei Community Center → Shimokaji → east of Nakayama overpass → City Hall

Distance: approximately 10 kilometers

Estimated time: approximately 3 hours 30 minutes

Fee: 200 yen (insurance, collected on the day)

What to bring: packed lunch, drinks, rain gear, Sugo-ashi handbook (if you have one)

Registration: by July 18 (Saturday) with ASA Hanno
Phone: 042-972-4701
Fax: 042-974-2190

Weather cancellation check: From 9:00 a.m. on the day of the event, contact ASA Hanno to confirm if it is cancelled due to weather or other reasons.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/12784.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-ashi Event July 22, 2026 (Wednesday) Oku-Musashi Nature Trail
